examples.label: Example response
Example request

documents.title: Configuring the Default Protection Policy for Newly Purchased Public IP Addresses

parameters.name: enable_L7
parameters.description: Whether to enable layer-7 protection.

parameters.name: traffic_pos_id
parameters.description: Position ID of traffic. The value ranges from 1 to 9, or 99, or 33 to 36.

parameters.name: http_request_pos_id
parameters.description: Position ID of number of HTTP requests. The value ranges from 1 to 15 and 33 to 36.

parameters.name: cleaning_access_pos_id
parameters.description: Position ID of access limit during cleaning. The value ranges from 1 to 8, or 99, or 33 to 36.

parameters.name: app_type_id
parameters.description:
Application type ID. Possible values:

0

1

parameters.name: task_id
parameters.description: Task ID (nonnegative integer) character string

parameters.name: enable_L7
parameters.description: Whether L7 defense has been enabled.

parameters.name: traffic_pos_id
parameters.description: Position ID of traffic. The value ranges from 1 to 9, or 99, or 33 to 36.

parameters.name: http_request_pos_id
parameters.description: Position ID of number of HTTP requests. The value ranges from 1 to 15 and 33 to 36.

parameters.name: cleaning_access_pos_id
parameters.description: Position ID of access limit during cleaning. The value ranges from 1 to 8, or 99, or 33 to 36.

parameters.name: app_type_id
parameters.description:
Application type ID. Possible values:

0

1

documents.title: Querying Events of a Specified EIP

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description:
Limit of number of returned results or the maximum number of returned results of a query. The value ranges from 1 to 100, and this parameter is used together with the offset parameter.

If neither limit nor offset is used, query results of all ECSs are returned.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Offset. This parameter is valid only when used together with the limit parameter.

parameters.name: sort_dir
parameters.description:
Possible values:

desc: indicates that query results are given and sorted by time in descending order.

asc: indicates that query results are given and sorted by time in ascending order.

The default value is desc.

documents.title: Querying the Default Protection Policy Configured for the Newly Purchased Public IP Addresses
Querying the Defense Status of a Specified EIP
Querying the List of EIP Defense Statuses

parameters.name: status
parameters.description:
Possible values:

normal: indicates that the defense status is normal.

configuring: indicates that defense is being configured.

notConfig: indicates that defense is not configured.

packetcleaning: indicates that traffic cleaning is underway.

packetdropping: indicates that traffic is discarded.

If this parameter is not used, the defense statuses of all ECSs are displayed in the Neutron-queried order by default.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of returned results. The value ranges from 1 to 100.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Offset. The value ranges from 0 to 2147483647.

parameters.name: ip
parameters.description: IP address. Both IPv4 and IPv6 addresses are supported. For example, if you enter ?ip=192.168, the defense status of EIPs corresponding to 192.168.111.1 and 10.192.168.8 is returned.

documents.title: Querying the Traffic of a Specified EIP

parameters.name: period_start_date
parameters.description: Start date of a seven-day period

parameters.name: enable_L7
parameters.description: Whether to enable L7 defense

parameters.name: traffic_pos_id
parameters.description: Position ID of traffic. The value ranges from 1 to 9, or 99, or 33 to 36.

parameters.name: http_request_pos_id
parameters.description: Position ID of number of HTTP requests. The value ranges from 1 to 15 and 33 to 36.

parameters.name: cleaning_access_pos_id
parameters.description: Position ID of access limit during cleaning. The value ranges from 1 to 8, or 99, or 33 to 36.

parameters.name: app_type_id
parameters.description:
Application type ID. Possible values:

0

1

parameters.name: error_code
parameters.description: Internal error code

parameters.name: error_description
parameters.description: Internal error description

parameters.name: task_id
parameters.description:
ID of a task. This ID can be used to query the status of the task.

This field is reserved for use in task auditing later. It is temporarily unused.

parsed.error_description: Task has been received and is being processed.
